name: Extra Cash Pawn
description_short: Extra Cash Pawn operates three Oklahoma City locations offering short and long-term pawn loans on jewelry, firearms, musical instruments, and brand-name merchandise with same-day funding.
description_long:
Extra Cash Pawn is a multi-location pawn shop operator based in Oklahoma City with three retail locations serving the surrounding area. The company has established itself as a traditional collateral-based lender, accepting items of value as security for loans rather than requiring credit checks or income verification. Their business model centers on providing quick access to cash for customers who need immediate funds, positioning themselves as an alternative to traditional lenders for those facing financial constraints or time-sensitive cash needs.

The company's service offerings span multiple merchandise categories including designer and custom jewelry, firearms and accessories, musical instruments, and general brand-name products. Extra Cash Pawn explicitly advertises both short-term and long-term loan options on collateral items, suggesting flexible repayment structures. They have modernized their operations with a mobile app (MobilePawn) that allows customers to renew loans and make layaway payments remotely, and offer online shopping with curbside pickup through shop.extracashpawn.com. All three locations operate extended hours including Sunday service (12pm-5pm), indicating convenience-focused service design.

Extra Cash Pawn differentiates itself through emphasis on store cleanliness, professional staff conduct, and customer service quality—themes repeated throughout their website marketing. Customer testimonials highlight the facility's cleanliness as a distinguishing factor compared to other pawn shops. The company also highlights the breadth of merchandise categories available, positioning themselves as a one-stop option for both borrowing against collateral and purchasing discounted brand-name goods. Their three-location network provides geographic convenience across Oklahoma City.

As a pawn shop, Extra Cash Pawn operates within a lending model that inherently carries limitations and considerations. While pawn loans avoid credit reporting and traditional underwriting, customers must own items of sufficient value to borrow against, and loan amounts are determined by collateral value rather than borrowing needs. The company's website does not disclose interest rates, fees, or loan terms, which is typical but important for consumers to understand before engaging. This service is best suited for individuals with valuable items to pledge who need immediate cash and have the ability to retrieve their items within the loan period.
address: 1309 N MacArthur Blvd, Oklahoma City, OK 73127

company_info.headquarters: 1309 N MacArthur Blvd, Oklahoma City, OK 73127

pros: Three convenient Oklahoma City locations with extended hours including Sunday service (12pm-5pm)
Mobile app (MobilePawn) enables remote loan renewal and layaway payments without store visit
Accepts diverse collateral types: jewelry, firearms, musical instruments, and brand-name merchandise
Online shopping with curbside pickup option (shop.extracashpawn.com)
Customer testimonials emphasize store cleanliness and professional, friendly staff
Offers both short-term and long-term loan options on collateral
Provides same-day funding for pawn loans without credit checks
cons: No interest rates, fees, or loan terms disclosed on website—critical pricing information unavailable to prospective borrowers
Pawn model requires customers to own items of sufficient value; not accessible to those without collateral
Loan amounts determined by collateral value, not actual financial need—may not provide needed cash amount
Risk of item loss if customer cannot repay loan within terms and chooses not to redeem collateral
Limited to Oklahoma City area; only three physical locations available
best_for: Individuals with valuable items (jewelry, instruments, firearms) who need immediate cash for short-term needs
Customers with poor credit or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
People seeking quick same-day funding without undergoing credit checks or income verification
Bargain shoppers looking to purchase discounted brand-name merchandise and firearms
diagnosis: Extra Cash Pawn is best for individuals with valuable items who need immediate cash and cannot or prefer not to use traditional credit products. The critical caveat is that loan terms, interest rates, and fees are not disclosed on their website—customers must visit a location or call to understand the true cost of borrowing, and should verify these terms align with their financial situation before pledging items.
services: Short-term pawn loans on jewelry and gold items
Long-term pawn loans on merchandise and collateral
Designer and custom jewelry sales at discount prices
Firearms and accessories sales (new and used)
Brand-name merchandise sales at discounted prices
Mobile app loan renewal and layaway payment processing
